title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NIT Trichy Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy Global Group:
NIT Trichy Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy Global Group!
